Healthcare

Healthcare WiFi that improves patient experience and protects patient data.

Hospitals, GP surgeries, and care homes need staff and guest networks that satisfy auditors and don't create more tickets. Purple overlays onto existing infrastructure and proves itself in weeks, with a branded captive portal for patients and visitors and the Purple app handling identity for staff and reconnection for returning visitors.

Staff access tied to identity, revoked automatically on leaving
A branded guest network live for patients and visitors in weeks
Care home residents get their own private network bubble via the app
The conversation

What your customer is dealing with right now.

Slow, unreliable WiFi is hurting patient satisfaction scores

A seamless and secure WiFi connection for patients and visitors is crucial for satisfaction, slow or unreliable internet leads to frustration and negative reviews. Guest WiFi offers easy onboarding, high-speed access, and content filtering to ensure a positive digital experience throughout a stay.

Staff tablets and medical devices fighting for the same network

Healthcare facilities rely on a multitude of connected devices, from staff tablets to critical medical equipment. Staff WiFi ties access to identity through the Purple app, prioritizing traffic for essential devices and keeping clinical applications and communication tools reliably connected.

Long-stay wards and care homes with no private network for residents

Long-term patients and care home residents need a network that feels like home, not a shared hospital WiFi. Multi-tenant WiFi gives each resident their own private network bubble, provisioned through the Purple app.

Where Purple fits

The products that solve it.

STAFF WIFI
Priority access for staff tablets and clinical devices

WPA3-Enterprise ties access to identity through the Purple app, prioritizing traffic for essential devices and keeping clinical applications and communication tools reliably connected.

Works with Entra ID, Google & Okta
GUEST WIFI
A better connected stay for patients and visitors

Branded portal with easy onboarding, high-speed access, and content filtering, turning a compliance requirement into a visible, patient-facing amenity.

Branded captive portal or seamless connection
MULTI-TENANT WIFI
A private network bubble for every resident

Long-term patients and care home residents get their own private network bubble, provisioned through the Purple app, not a shared hospital WiFi.

Per-unit network isolation, via xPSK

Real results from healthcare customers.

Real case studies from real healthcare deployments, each with its own numbers.

783k
WiFi sessions in year one
Healthcare
St George's Healthcare NHS Trust
The Trust met the mandate cheaply, as a software overlay rather than a hardware replacement, while capturing patient feedback and promoting the hospital charity through the splash screens.
250k
visitors annually
Healthcare
The Queen Elizabeth Hospital
Patients and visitors gained free guest WiFi across the hospital, while the trust gained rich visitor analytics.
